topic: ADK setup robustness + LLM connection + e2e env audit (single-session, multi-issue)

current_phase: shipped + verified (LLM connection 401 RESOLVED via secure-store apiKey cleanup; agent receives correct dev gw key, tool_result frames flowing). e2e 04 spec FAIL persists for unrelated reason (LLM calls skill_sessions/skill_config instead of skill_time — separate prompt/tool-routing issue, not session scope). #329 split-brain root cause identified as adk-store.ts:255-263 collision (apiKey+naiaKey → same env) — needs follow-up shell fix.

G: #329 minimal hotfix (agent 6cc41a1: force-apply NAIA_ANYLLM_BASE_URL/API_KEY in config_update + cachedLlm invalidate) + root submodule bump (alpha-adk cb8fe36). e2e 04 401 root cause traced through codex+gemini cross-review to apiKey field collision in shell adk-store.ts. Verified fix: removing apiKey from Tauri secure-keys.dat resolves 401. L059 lesson documented.

decisions.decision: 5 엄격분리 commit (hunk-level Edit for mixed files)
decisions.rationale: Each commit owns a single GitHub issue → easier review, revert, bisect. AdkSetupScreen.tsx 11+4+1 hunks split via working-tree-reset → patch-apply → Edit

decisions.decision: CAFE_NAIA_KEY → NAIA_API_KEY rename bundled into C5 (#328 e2e commit) rather than separate #330 commit
decisions.rationale: Single-variable rename touched only e2e files which are all in C5 scope; full #330 (5 other vars) still deferred

decisions.decision: dev gateway URL (https://naia-gateway-dev-181404717065...run.app) treated as not-secret, prod key (gw-R7Ffk2...) kept commented out in personal .env
decisions.rationale: URL is just a Cloud Run endpoint; .env is gitignored so prod key never enters repo
Surgical change; other callers may rely on boolean check_naia_settings semantics
Only settings-dir-determining vars trigger chicken-and-egg; other keys flow correctly via readNaiaSettings on new dir

decisions.decision: Mock clone via env flag (NAIA_E2E_MOCK_CLONE) rather than separate test command
decisions.rationale: Single command surface; mock activated only in e2e context; production code path unchanged

decisions.decision: Defer full CAFE→NAIA rename (5 remaining vars) to its own PR (#330)
decisions.rationale: Mechanical multi-file rename should not be conflated with bug fixes

decisions.decision: Push directly to main (no feature branch)
decisions.rationale: User explicit choice this session; future commits may revisit feature-branch+PR model per CLAUDE.md convention

constraints_discovered.constraint: shell uses VITE_NAIA_GATEWAY_URL / VITE_NAIA_DEV_GATEWAY_URL (build-time) vs agent uses NAIA_GATEWAY_URL (runtime); shell omits gatewayUrl from chat_request → agent prod hardcoded fallback
TranslationKey was not exported from i18n.ts — fixed
Tauri 2 webview exposes __TAURI_INTERNALS__.invoke regardless of withGlobalTauri; __TAURI__.core.invoke requires withGlobalTauri=true
constraints_discovered.scope: e2e specs needing direct Tauri invoke from JS execute

constraints_discovered.constraint: Mocha (wdio framework) uses 'after' not 'afterAll'; default test timeout 60s insufficient for ADK clone flows
wdio webview session is lost when Tauri app cycles through ADK switch — root cause unknown, blocks spec 24 S1
agent has 4 separate hardcoded prod gateway URLs (lab-proxy.ts:47, lab-proxy-live.ts:55, registry.ts:246, bin/naia-agent.ts:2397)
constraints_discovered.scope: #329 fix must cover all 4 — single env override (NAIA_GATEWAY_URL) is cleanest

constraints_discovered.constraint: alpha-adk root has 'projects/' in .gitignore but submodules registered via .gitmodules; submodule pointer bumps need 'git add -f projects/<name>'
